entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: An opportunistic fungal pathogen that produces carcinogenic aflatoxin and infects peanuts

entities.name: AFLATOXIN
entities.description: A carcinogenic toxin produced by Aspergillus flavus that constrains food safety and human health

entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogea L., the host plant subject to Aspergillus flavus infection

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: The ability of peanut genotypes to resist the growth of A. flavus and the accumulation of aflatoxin

entities.name: COMPARATIVE PROTEOMICS
entities.description: An analytical technique used to compare protein expression between contrasting genotypes to elucidate molecular mechanisms of resistance

entities.name: JL 24
entities.description: A susceptible peanut variety used as a control in the comparative proteomic study

entities.name: ALFALFA DEFENSIN GENE
entities.description: A gene expressed in a transgenic peanut derivative that confers resistance to A. flavus

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA LYASE
entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.name: CINNAMIC ACID-4-HYDROXYLASE
entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.name: CHALCONE SYNTHASE
entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.description: A resistance protein associated with secondary metabolic pathways induced in resistant peanut genotypes

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLIC PATHWAYS
entities.description: Biological pathways involving resistance proteins that contribute to the plant's defense mechanism

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY-ASSOCIATED PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins identified as potential candidate target genes for breeding interventions to mitigate aflatoxin

entities.name: BREEDING INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Precise genetic interventions aimed at mitigating aflatoxin production by targeting susceptibility genes
